---
title: "Título del informe"
subtitle: "Subtítulo del informe"
author: "Jesús F. García Gavilán"
date: today
lang: es
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    theme:
      - cosmo
      - styles.scss
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    df-print: paged
  pdf:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    fig-cap-location: bottom
    include-in-header: preambulo.tex
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

source("report_theme.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.align = "center",
  fig.width = 8,
  fig.height = 5,
  dpi = 300
)
